meta.title: Financial Workspace
meta.description: Financial operations workspace for clients, invoices, expenses, documents, and automation.

landing.title: Financial operations for freelancers and small teams
landing.description: Track clients, invoices, expenses, documents, cashflow, forecasts, and fiscal exports without turning your business into a spreadsheet maze.
landing.clients: Client records, payment profiles, and team access stay organized by workspace.
landing.invoices: Incoming sales invoices and outgoing purchase invoices are grouped by fiscal year.
landing.cashflow: Forecast expected income, expected expenses, and projected net for simple planning.
landing.documents: Prepare accountant-ready folders for documents and fiscal exports.

shell.automationDescription: Payment, spend, and document rules ready.

errors.idempotencyConflict: Idempotency-Key already used with a different request body.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.description: Access your workspace, clients, invoices, documents, and cashflow controls.
auth.notConfigured: Supabase Auth is not configured. Local development can continue with the fallback workspace, but production login requires Supabase environment variables.
auth.authNotConfigured: Supabase Auth is not configured for this environment.
auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.

dashboard.title: Financial control center
dashboard.description: Receivables, clients, and invoice activity at a glance.
dashboard.noInvoices: No invoices yet. Create one from the invoices page.
dashboard.addFirstClient: Add your first client to start invoicing.

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Manage billing relationships and contacts. The starting point for any invoice.
clients.empty: No clients yet. Create your first one to start invoicing.
clients.detailsDescription: Only the name is required to get started.
clients.newDescription: Create a billing relationship before issuing an invoice.
clients.name: Client name

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Track sales invoices, purchase invoices, due dates, and fiscal organization.
invoices.listDescription: Filter by money direction and review fiscal-year metadata.
invoices.empty: No invoices found for this filter.
invoices.newDescription: Build an itemized sales or purchase invoice and choose a status.
invoices.detailsDescriptionReady: Pick a client or supplier, add line items, and set the direction.
invoices.detailsDescriptionNoClients: Add a client first to start invoicing.
invoices.needsClient: You need at least one client before creating an invoice.
invoices.createClientFirst: Create a client first before issuing an invoice.

cashflow.title: Cashflow
cashflow.description: Thirty-day outlook with $24,470 projected net movement.

forecast.title: Yearly forecast
forecast.description: Set simple yearly expectations for income, expenses, and projected net.
forecast.selectYearDescription: Forecasts are stored per workspace and year.
forecast.forecastDescription: Projected net is expected income minus expected expenses.

documents.title: Documents
documents.exportDescription: Prepare invoice folder metadata by fiscal year and money direction.
documents.folderStructureDescription: ZIP export is not enabled yet. These are the folders the export will use.
documents.noFolders: No invoice folders yet. Create an invoice to prepare fiscal export metadata.
documents.invoiceMetadataDescription: Storage paths are saved now; PDF files come later.
documents.noMetadata: No invoice metadata is ready yet.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Reusable workspace setups for freelancers and small businesses.
templates.freelancerTagline: Track income, expenses, and runway in one place — built for solo operators.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Workspace configuration for payments, documents, automation, and financial controls.
settings.teamAccessDescription: Manage workspace members, roles, and invitations.
settings.teamAccessNote: Owner and admin roles can invite teammates.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the interface language for this workspace view.

sections.workspaceProfileDescription: Organization name, base currency, billing identity, and fiscal settings.
sections.paymentOperationsDescription: Reminder cadence, payment methods, and receivables policies.
sections.documentStorageDescription: Contracts, receipts, invoices, and future storage configuration.
sections.automationRulesDescription: Inngest-backed events for payment reminders, spend review, and document processing.

team.title: Team
team.description: Manage access to {{workspace}}. Workspace data is isolated by membership.
team.membersDescription: People with access to this workspace.
team.invitationsDescription: Pending and historical invitations for this workspace.

invite.title: Invite teammate
invite.description: Add an owner, operator, or advisor to the current workspace.
invite.panelDescription: The teammate will receive workspace access after accepting.
invite.invalid: Enter a valid email and role.

invite.unavailableDescription: This workspace invitation is invalid or expired.

validation.clientNameMax: Client name must be 255 characters or fewer.
validation.emailInvalid: Email must be a valid address.
validation.serverDerivedInvoiceFields: Fiscal year and storage path are generated server-side.
validation.issueDateInvalid: Issue date must be a valid YYYY-MM-DD date.
validation.dueDateInvalid: Due date must be a valid YYYY-MM-DD date.
validation.itemsRequired: At least one invoice item with a description is required.
validation.invoiceLocked: Invoice is locked and cannot be modified
validation.fiscalYearRequired: A valid fiscal year is required.
